---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused SDK capability or contract improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the robotics engineering workflow or limitation. Avoid starting with
a proposed implementation.

## Current workaround

Explain how the problem is handled today.

## Proposed outcome

Describe the smallest useful outcome and who benefits.

## Scope and constraints

State whether the proposal affects deterministic behavior, public API,
serialized formats, synchronous execution, or transport independence.

Interstice Telemetry intentionally excludes robot control, networking, cloud
services, timers, background loops, and real hardware drivers from the core.
